query: SELECT id, nickname, level, tier, bp_constitution + bp_strength + bp_defense + bp_agility + bp_magic as total_bp, bp_constitution, bp_strength, bp_defense, bp_agility, bp_magic FROM game_player_pets ORDER BY total_bp DESC LIMIT 10;
